creator: peter.edwards@openet-telecom.com
text:
bin/7043 notes the lack of msdosfs and cd9660 support in fstat.
This
patch adds that functionality

Fix: Unroll the following tar.Z into /usr/src/usr.bin/fstat, and apply
patch-aa.

Our mail setup really sucks, so sorry if this has knackered the gnats
bot.
